title: Exploration x 2011165 Optimized+
description: With From The Fog. A heavily modified Skippy Optimized intended to add over 50 new structures and biomes for a more immersive exploration experience.
body:
WITH MAN FROM THE FOG, IF YOU **DO NOT** WANT FROM THE FOG DOWNLOAD THIS:
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/exploration-x-skippy-optimized/](https://modrinth.com/modpack/exploration-x-skippy-optimized/)

A heavily modified version of Skippy Optimized which adds over 50 new stuctures and biomes to make the exploration side of Minecraft more immersive while still keeping a Vanilla style. Incudes Sodium and Lithium to increase performance over Vanilla Minecraft. All mods in Skippy Optimized are present in this modpack. This modpack uses Dungeons and Taverns and every single Dungeons and Taverns overhaul.

Skippy Optimized:

This Minecraft Modpack is full of essential mods to help Minecraft run faster on your system. Whether you have a fast or slow computer, these mods can make Minecraft run better than ever. There is also avalibility for shaders with the Iris Shaders mod. With the help of Xaero's Minimap and World Map you can never get lost in your singleplayer world or servers. The Essential Mod adds even more features to host your singleplayer worlds as miniservers for your friends to join if they have the mod installed. All this with even more mods can make your Minecraft experience the best it can be!
